title: Product A — Linen tote
description: A lightweight linen tote for daily errands. Reinforced handles and an interior pocket for keys or a phone.

title: Product B — Ceramic mug
description: Hand-glazed ceramic mug with a comfortable grip. Microwave-safe; we recommend hand washing to preserve the finish.

title: Product C — Desk lamp
description: Adjustable LED desk lamp with warm and cool modes. Stable base and a small footprint for compact workspaces.

title: Product D — Wool throw
description: Soft merino-blend throw for sofas and beds. Breathable enough for year-round use in most climates.
